title: InnoDB recovery can take a while with a lot of partitions and HDD
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR, age INTEGER);
INSERT INTO t (name, age) VALUES ('Alice', 30), ('Bob', NULL), ('Charlie', -1);
SELECT * FROM t WHERE age IS NULL OR age < 0;
CREATE TABLE t1 AS SELECT * FROM t;
key_bug_features: Slow recovery with many partitions on HDD
